candidates.why: Separate operating amortization line, but it appears related to rights rather than merchandise cost of sales; not clearly attributable to the selected COGS row 'Cost of Sales, Merchandise'.
Separate operating depreciation line at the same level as major operating expenses, but there is no indication it belongs specifically to merchandise COGS rather than broader operating overhead.
Appears linked to transfer/contract-right activity, not to merchandise cost of sales.

variables.notes: No explicit D&A row is identified as belonging to 'Cost of Sales, Merchandise'. Conservative approach avoids double counting and misallocation.

candidates.why: Separate same-level operating line outside the selected SG&A component rows, suggesting D&A is not embedded in those selected rows; however this row also includes impairment, which should not be added for this task.
Operating depreciation component of the separate D&A line; cleaner than the summary because it excludes impairment and sits outside the selected SG&A component rows.
Operating amortization component listed separately from the selected SG&A component rows; more relevant than contract-right amortization, though exact bucket attribution is not fully explicit.
Appears tied to transfer/contract-right activity rather than SG&A overhead, so it should not be added to XSGA_DA.

variables.notes: Selected SG&A reference bucket consists of 'Selling/Advertising', 'Administrative', and 'Staff Costs'. The visible D&A lines are presented separately at the operating level rather than as sub-components of those selected rows, so they should be added separately. The impairment-containing summary row was not chosen to avoid including impairment. 'Amortization of Contract Rights' appears transfer-related/non-SG&A and is excluded.
